74df617832.translation: "Probably Mrs. Alexander would not be a professor if the 'system' (of racism in the USA) remained as merciless as she says it is today. Nor would African Americans be CEOs of major companies, banks, members of the Senate and House of Representatives, the Supreme Court, and [...]."

74df823c29.text: „Die menschliche Stimme des Cellos, das im Klang jedes andere Instrument übertrifft, ging mir zu Herzen, wenn Henriette es spielte, und sie wußte es.“
74df823c29.translation: The human voice of the cello, which surpasses every other instrument in sound, touched my heart when Henriette played it, and she knew it.

74dfa4165d.text: Onkel Johann hat ein Haus in Weiche.
74dfa4165d.translation: Uncle Johann has a house in Weiche.

74dfdb3e2d.text: Weshalb sind die klassischen Handtücher gestreift?
74dfdb3e2d.translation: Why are the classic towels striped?

74e05ce1a9.translation: Many people with a migration background live in this district.

74e3df300f.translation: "The island location spared the inhabitants of Britain from invasions from outside, although there were already isolated attacks by Frankish and Saxon forces at that time."
